report.indication: Low back pain with left L5 radiculopathy.
report.technique: Multiplanar multisequence MRI of the lumbar spine without contrast.
report.findings: L4-L5: mild facet arthropathy. L5-S1: left paracentral disc protrusion contacting the descending S1 nerve root.
report.impression: 1. L4-L5 disc protrusion with left S1 nerve root impingement.
